feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EWM Exception Codes
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

We have sensitive material that must not be touched by hand. That's why we often want to pick the whole box (24 pcs) instead of the requested quantity (1 pc). There is one HU in a storage bin.

Current situation:
Request quantity of a warehouse task with 1 pc.
The stock is increased in the RF with an exception code (with process code DIFF in the background).

The requirement is that a complete box with 24 pc is picked instead of just the request quantity of 1 pc.

This works so far, except for the following case, which also seems logical:

A warehouse task is created in storage bin 1 with a request for 1 pc.
A short time later, a warehouse task 2 is created in storage bin 1 with a request for 1 pc.

Problem:
The exception code can no longer be used within the first warehouse tasks, as a second warehouse tasks has been created in the storage bin/HU. So we can not increase the request amoung. 

How can we ensure that the exception code can always be used?
The reason for the problem is that a second warehouse tasks exists on this storage bin/HU.

It makes no sense to block the storage bin that no other warehouse task will be created, as it will then no longer be possible to pick goods from this storage bin (for our first warehouse task). Rounding options? Standard options? Do you know a BadI for example to pick from a storage bin that is blocked? 

Any creative ideas?
Thank you! 🙂

entry.title: Enhancement our user exsit in outbound delivery save
entry.content: Enhancement our user exist to  in outbound delivery save for integration with CRM

entry.title: Staging to production with intermediate storage bins
entry.content:
Hi,

we use advanced production integration based on PMRs in EWM 9.40.

In one of our warehouses a third party system is installed on a production line. Here we would like to implement the following process.

1) A production order will be released and a PMR will be created in EWM. 

2) E.g. 1 or 2 hours before the planned production start, warehouse tasks for staging are created (e.g. by /SCWM/STAGE) to transfer all required components to an intermediate bin in a pallet storage that is inside the production supply area. The destination bin should be proposed by EWM (= empty bin) or it will be confirmed manually by the forklift driver. 

3)  Some time later the production line will be set up for the production order. This is the trigger for the third party system on the production line to send a first warehouse request to EWM to transfer specified components from the intermediate pallet storage to specified storage bins on the production line. 
In the running production the third party system has to create further warehouse requests if e.g. the available quantity of a component falls below a defined value.  

4) The consumption for the components is posted by the third party system during production with function module /SCWM/MFG_CONSUME_ITEMS_EXT. The storage bin on the production line (see step 3) is specified as the goods movement bin for the consumption postings.

 

The steps 1 and 4 are no problem. But I don´t know how to set up the steps 2 and 3.

Is this process possible in EWM 9.40 in standard?  

Thank you for any advice.

Best regards, Julian

entry.title: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content:
Hello, i have the requirement to change the counted Result of a Physical Inventory, like you do in the Transaction LI12N.

I have already found a function module to enter count results -> L_INV_COUNT_EXT
But if i try to overwrite the Position i get the exception NO_COUNT_ALLOWED.
Has anyone a idea how to do this?

Kind Regards Niklas

entry.title: Outbound POSC: Final loading WT not getting generated automatically
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured POSC for outbound but WT for final step is not getting generated. Attached are my config steps. I completed picking, packing at WC and movement to staging.

(I read one blog for expert where it is not recommended to have load task automatic but this is technically possible). Please advise.

Regards

entry.title: Not able to maintain condition record for custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

We developed one custom form for Physical Inventory in EWM. For that we created one custom action definition and one Badi filter (method call) for PPF. But getting an error while maintaining condition record in SCWM/PRHU6. Please suggest if I missed any step. 

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: Spool request not generated for custom form in EWM
entry.content:
Developed the custom form for Physical Inventory in EWM but spool is not generated. maintained the condition records (SCWM/PRHU6) and spool parameters (SCWM/60000431).

Please suggest. 

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: How to display landed cost of multiped PO
entry.content: How I can get the landed cost list against PO list. If I am not authorized for the SAP Tables. I want to know the standard T. Code for that if SAP provided.

entry.title: New Handling Unit Transactions in S/4HANA - COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear
entry.content:
Dear all,

in the ECC world we speak about different Handling Unit Transactions like COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE.

But if we implement now the S/4HANA System, then these transactions COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear.

Which new replacement transactions will be for them in S/4HANA world? 

 

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Chris

entry.title: Usage Decision QA11 (321 movement type)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

user done usage decision for 280pcs with 321 movmt type from quality to unrestricted, but  the stock is present in Q (quality control stock) in WM. i want the stock in Available stock.
can anyone please guide me how to do it?

thank you in advance

entry.title: Customer uses Bottles to store liquid. they want to label as HUs and have guided putaway to the HU.
entry.content:
Customer uses Bottles to store liquid. they want to label the Bottles as HUs and have guided putaway to the HU. The HU can not change (if possible) and be resused constantly. If possbile assign the HU to the Product 

Is this possible? 

Essentially it is mobile bin But need to reuse the HU and have a Max Level set on the HU so that if one is filled System will suggest the next suitable HU for the material in another bottle that meets the same requirement.

My first thought here is to used Fixed storage and Lable the Bottle as the BIN with Barcode. The down side to this if the Bottle is moved then there is no traceability to where it in the warehouse. So really needs to be traceble to where the bottle is in the warehouse at all time. So Fixed HU if possible. Is this Achievable??

This is in EWM

entry.title: Vas ewm for auxiliary products
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am-trying to post auxiliary products maintained as part of packspec into vas work center for inbound process but getting the below error

”You can only post to vas bin BBBB using a handling unit”

can someone please explain what is needed

entry.title: SAP EWM table /SCWM/AQUA need to remove entry category PDO
entry.content: SAP EWM table /SCWM/AQUA need to remove entry category PDO is present then it need remove no document no presesnt

entry.title: Stock Room Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP WM will disappear after 2027 in the S/4HANA world.

Stock Room Management is part of SAP WM but with less functionalities. It has the same coding and the same tables like SAP WM.

Furthermore Stock Room Management have the same transactions like SAP WM.

But how I make the difference in the system that I use Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

Is there a customizing setting that I choose Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

How I make the difference in the system?

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Christian

entry.title: NEW receiving BIN vs the GR-area bin
entry.content:
When creating the starter system and Dev in sAp s/4hana public cloud the GR-Area Bin is created and all inbound delivery after the GR go there.

Customer wants to name this bin something else. I create a new bin REC-AREA and assigned it to  storage type S910.

I removed the GR-AREA Bin.

Now when I do a goods receipt nothing happens. It will not do the GR.

It cant be this hard. What am I missing? Any help would be greatful

entry.title: How to use Revision Level to segregate inventory of a material and use accordingly in production ?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Our customer is using revision levels (material index) to track technical evolution of materials.

On S/4hana cloud public, we are wondering how to achieve this using the standard Revision Level function which does not seem to have any impact on any process (purchasing, production & planning, inventory receipts or shipments, stock management). Is it only an information that cannot be leveraged at any point?

We have considered using batches but this would require important changes for the new field creation and dislay on every single relevant areas/business objects. Also products that are not batch-managed cannot use this solution (e.g.: small screws).

For the record, I found this simliar question which is not very recent so I'm try anyway (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-can-we-differentiate-between-stock-on-basis-of-revision-level/qaq-p/12553152)

Thanks in advance for your inputs, thoughts or experiences.

Adrien

entry.title: FSM-EWM Integration
entry.content:
Hello Community!

I would like to know if there is an integration between SAP Field Service Management (FSM) and SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM). I would like to associate the bins stock in SAP EWM with the technicians' warehouse stock in SAP FSM,

 

I appreciate any documentation you can share with me!

Best Regards,

Dayanna González

 

 SAP Community SAP Field Service Management SAP Extended Warehouse Management SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: how to print handling units in custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

Greetings!

In our project (S/4HANA Embedded EWM) we are developing the custom form for Physical inventory in EWM. But, we couldn't find the logic to print Handling units in the form. Can any one suggest the logic or any Function Module to print the handling units.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: Capacity Usage field configuration in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud for Warehouse Task creation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on SAP S4HANA Public Cloud and stuck on an issue where in Material Master's UOM screen has a field called Capacity Usage which has only 3 decimal places (Updated using calculation via API). Our calculation has values such as 0.000785 which post rounding off becomes 0.008 in this field. Now when we try to create a warehouse task in SAP EWM, this Capacity usage field is used and based on this field total Quantity is splitted into different Storage Bins. Because the value is rounded off, Bin splitting scenario is not working properly as we need at least 5 decimal places. Is there a way we can achieve this by creating out own custom field and assign that field to some configuration or any other solution if available.

Thanks & Regards,

Aman Mittal
